title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw, in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños, Laguna to Enter Into Contract for the Services of the Following Registered Nurses : (1) Carina M. Matira, Rn; (2) Benrie Florante B. Cadiz, Rn; (3) Julienne C. Urbano, Rn; (4) Angela Joselle C. Santos, Rn; and (5) Christopher P. Juliano, Rn with Monthly Compensation of P 17,680.00 Each Through Gad Fund. (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 09/06/2021)
